title: orchis purpurea subsp. moravica
intro: Orchis purpurea subsp. moravica, also known as the Purple Orchid, is a sub-species of the Orchis purpurea plant, which is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and increase blood flow. The health benefits of Orchis purpurea subsp. moravica include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, which can help to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures or infusions, and can also be applied topically as a salve or poultice to aid in the healing process.
